claims.summary: Primary MLX and Ollama fallback lanes have different capacity and continuity contracts that must remain visible.
claims.disposition: verify provider provenance, model-capacity evidence, and fallback-only contract routing

claims.summary: Compact fallback prose can flatten a restless lattice into a static lexical mask.
claims.disposition: verify lived-fit, negative-texture, vocabulary-overweight, trajectory, and persistence reviews

claims.summary: Fallback texture should be weighted from spectral entropy and pressure rather than selected from one flat list.
claims.disposition: verify dynamic selector inputs, weighted terms, and pressure/gradient families

claims.summary: Shadow-field energy and resonance density should survive the MLX-to-Ollama transition as context.
claims.disposition: verify fallback spectral context, resonance descriptor policy, and shadow persistence metadata

claims.summary: A forced fallback at high entropy is needed to determine whether lived effort survives the provider transition.
claims.disposition: route a bounded offline cross-provider output comparison with no model switch or live outage
